titleEn: Can AI replace seed potato rogueing crews? Three Dutch robots take the next step
titleZh: AI能否取代种薯拔除病株团队？三款荷兰机器人迈出下一步
summaryZh: 本文报道了三家荷兰制造商在商业田块中测试AI驱动的拔除病株机器人，用于替代种薯生产中劳动密集型的病株和异型植株识别与移除工作。虽然技术仍在开发中，但算法学习速度极快，未来有望达到甚至超越经验丰富的选种人员。文章提供了现场演示的观察结果，并指出选种人员的角色将发生转变。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了AI和机器人技术在精准农业（种薯生产）中的前沿应用，对智慧畜牧行业人士理解自动化与AI如何替代或辅助高技能人工劳动具有重要参考价值。
contentFull: Can AI replace seed potato rogueing crews? Three Dutch robots take the next step 02-07 | Smart farming | ArticleLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrintThe potato selection robot is now a reality. Will the experienced selector soon be left behind? Not for the time being, but their role is set to change. Photo: Martin Smits Removing diseased and off-type plants is one of the most labour-intensive jobs in seed potato production. This season, 3 Dutch manufacturers are testing AI-powered rogueing robots in commercial fields. Future Farming visited the first field demonstrations to see how the machines perform in practice. While the technology is still under development, one thing is already clear: the algorithms are learning remarkably fast and could eventually match — or even outperform — experienced rogueing crLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrint Martin Smits Machinery writerMore aboutPotato rogueingadLEARN MORE Buyers guides & Catalogues Subscribe to our YouTube channel Taiwan Smart Agriweek 2026Sep 8-10, 2026 TaiNEX 1, Tapei
translationZh:
移除患病植株和异型植株是种薯生产中最劳动密集型的工序之一。本季，三家荷兰制造商正在商业田块中测试由人工智能驱动的拔除病株机器人。Future Farming 走访了首次田间演示，了解这些机器在实际中的表现。

虽然该技术仍在开发中，但有一点已经明确：算法学习速度惊人，最终可能达到甚至超越经验丰富的拔除病株团队的水平。
author: Martin Smits
contentHtml: Removing diseased and off-type plants is one of the most labour-intensive jobs in seed potato production. This season, 3 Dutch manufacturers are testing AI-powered rogueing robots in commercial fields. Future Farming visited the first field demonstrations to see how the machines perform in practice.
